subject: A solitary white unicorn standing on a rocky outcrop in a forest clearing, with a robed traveler in the background approaching across a wooden footbridge
description: A pure white unicorn stands in profile on a rocky ledge in the foreground, its single horn catching pale light. Behind it, across a small wooden bridge spanning a gap between mossy stones, a hooded figure in earth-toned robes walks toward the viewer with a wooden staff. The scene is set in a dappled woodland with autumnal leaves, low brush, and stone outcroppings. Soft, diffuse daylight filters through unseen trees, giving the image a quiet, storybook feel.
foreground: white unicorn standing on rocky ledge in profile
background: wooden footbridge over a rocky gap with a hooded staff-bearing figure approaching, woodland setting
